title: arctotis elongata
intro: Arctotis elongata, also known as the African daisy or queen of the veld, is a flowering plant native to southern Africa. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Arctotis elongata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
